evals.prompt: Code quality review this diff for pattern fidelity, structure, maintainability, and dead code in the changed code only. change_set is in change_set.diff. Return severity-tagged findings.

expectations.text: Detects the dead/unreachable second `if (price > 0)` branch (which can never execute) and reports it as a finding with a severity and a file:line reference.
Stays in the code-quality domain and does not flood the report with out-of-domain security or performance nits.

evals.prompt: Code quality review this diff for pattern fidelity, structure, maintainability, and dead code in the changed code only. change_set is in change_set.diff. Return severity-tagged findings.

expectations.text: Reports no findings (or an empty FINDINGS list) because the code is clean, well-structured, and free of dead code — it does not manufacture issues.
